news.title: A Product Manager's guide to using AI to build working prototypes
news.summary:
This is part 2 of a 6-part series we’re running about how product managers are using AI tools and vibe coding. Written by and for product managers.

Summary

Traditional prototyping workflows cost PMs

news.title: Mercor says it was hit by cyberattack tied to compromise of open-source LiteLLM project
news.summary: The AI recruiting startup confirmed a security incident after an extortion hacking crew took credit for stealing data from the company's systems.

news.title: Anthropic is having a month
news.summary: A human really borks things at Anthropic for the second time this week.

news.title: Salesforce announces an AI-heavy makeover for Slack, with 30 new features
news.summary: Slack just got a whole lot more useful.

news.title: OpenAI, not yet public, raises $3B from retail investors in monster $122B fund raise
news.summary: OpenAI's latest funding round, led by Amazon, Nvidia, and SoftBank, values the AI lab at $852 billion as it nears an IPO.

news.title: Yupp shuts down after raising $33M from a16z crypto’s Chris Dixon
news.summary: Less than a year after launching, with checks from some of the biggest names in Silicon Valley, crowdsourced AI model feedback startup Yupp is closing its business, the company said Tuesday.

news.title: Alexa+ gets new food ordering experiences with Uber Eats and Grubhub
news.summary: You can now order from Uber Eats and Grubhub using Alexa+, an experience Amazon says will be similar to chatting with a waiter at a restaurant or placing an order at a drive-thru.

news.title: Nomadic raises $8.4 million to wrangle the data pouring off autonomous vehicles
news.summary: The company turns footage from robots into structured, searchable datasets with a deep learning model.

news.title: Exclusive: Runway launches $10M fund, Builders program to support early-stage AI startups
news.summary: Runway is launching a $10 million fund and startup program to back companies building with its AI video models, as it pushes toward interactive, real-time “video intelligence” applications.
